fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">HLD</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(454.11150197700044 73.90000915527344) rotate(0 41.2194647171209 46.31580515328917)"><path d="M0 0 C13.74 15.44, 68.7 77.19, 82.44 92.63 M0 0 C13.74 15.44, 68.7 77.19, 82.44 92.63" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="2" Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(Low Level Design)</text></g><g transform="translate(484.50193697455325 217.77042764220425) rotate(0 91.33992767333984 12.5)"><text x="0" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(High Level Design)</text></g><g transform="translate(14.726042769680134 260.9943894590147) rotate(0 163.55987548828125 62.5)"><text x="0" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Focus on implementation</text><text x="0" y="42.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Class level view</text><text x="0" y="67.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Class, methods, design patterns</text><text x="0" y="92.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Code maintainability, Scalability,</text><text x="0" y="117.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">  re-usability</text></g><g transform="translate(480.95305167682454 253.98559822962807) rotate(0 194.28985595703125 62.5)"><text x="0" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Focus on architecture</text><text x="0" y="42.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Bird's eye view</text><text x="0" y="67.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Tech stack, DB, APIs, Communication.</text><text x="0" y="92.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Server Scalibility, performance</text><text x="0" y="117.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Cost optimization</text></g><g transform="translate(12.758751138253501 440.7463736425053) rotate(0 217.58790588378906 17.5)"><text x="0" y="26.712" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Take an example - Quick Ride App</text></g><g transform="translate(21.277946313422945 483.4461925352732) rotate(0 125.83194732666016 17.5)"><text x="0" y="26.712" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Low Level Design - </text></g><g transform="translate(33.784598314610776 551.790347385007) rotate(0 133.829833984375 262.5)"><text x="0" y="19.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Driver.acceptRide()</text><text x="0" y="344.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ride.completeRide()</text></g><g transform="translate(376.4577296625739 548.415182681221) rotate(0 151.5 242.99999999999997)"><use href="#image-c1ae8eb488a5f8b83f54fa02266ea683df5500ee" width="303" height="486" opacity="1"></use></g><g transform="translate(725.7770799547816 520.7391344016601) rotate(0 263.65634932710964 318.91106279995324)"><use href="#image-14d381319aa7ca8d9af5dee45ddc97c81647a788" width="527" height="638" opacity="1"></use></g><g transform="translate(391.71774057124094 1060.530916405896) rotate(0 153.5 93)"><use href="#image-5c719b2ccb7fab8ccd7c2fa82515b1521f45b3ce" width="307" height="186" opacity="1"></use></g><g transform="translate(10 1353.6101219051507) rotate(0 128.9679412841797 17.5)"><text x="0" y="26.712" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">High Level Design - </text></g><g transform="translate(13.518037407708107 1427.1726593021208) rotate(0 158.4197998046875 75)"><text x="0" y="19.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">1. Functional Requirement - </text><text x="0" y="44.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     - User can book a ride</text><text x="0" y="69.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     - Driver can accept/reject rides.</text><text x="0" y="94.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     - User can track driver location.</text><text x="0" y="119.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     - Payment after ride completion.</text><text x="0" y="144.07999999999998" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     - Ride history.</text></g><g transform="translate(412.8838397581476 1424.1608174000592) rotate(0 111.13986206054688 12.5)"><text x="0" y="19.08" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">2. Architecturer Diagram</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(485.59956284512737 1463.2179051270393) rotate(0 58.88459608726953 14.676404572844149)"><path d="M7.34 0 C28.87 0, 50.39
